command_execution.description: OS command execution — immediate RCE if attacker-controlled

code_evaluation.description: Dynamic code evaluation — RCE if attacker-controlled string

shell_open.description: Opens URL/file with OS handler — can launch executables, exfiltrate via URL

execute_javascript.description: Injects JS into a webContents — XSS with full renderer privileges

html_injection.description: DOM XSS — in Electron, XSS can escalate to RCE via preload/IPC

file_write.description: File system write — arbitrary file write if path is attacker-controlled

file_delete.description: File deletion — DoS or security bypass if path attacker-controlled

navigation.description: Navigation to attacker-controlled URL — phishing, content injection

sql_query.description: SQL execution — injection if query built with attacker input

deserialization.description: Deserialization — prototype pollution or code exec with crafted input

node_require.note: Only dangerous if argument is attacker-controlled. Common false positive — check context.
node_require.description: Dynamic require — module loading with attacker-controlled path

native_addon.description: Native addon loading — DLL/SO hijacking if path controllable
